message:
fix(codegen): resolve CV/JSValue type mismatches and unused variable errors

- Always declare `var locals: [0]CV` even when var_count=0 (dead code may reference it)
- Fix for-of iterator codegen to properly convert between CV stack and JSValue:
  - for_of_start: use temp JSValue buffer for QuickJS iterator init
  - for_of_next: convert CV to JSValue when calling QuickJS functions
  - iterator_close: convert CV to JSValue before freeing
  - iterator_get_value_done: convert CV for property access
- Add `_ = &block_id;` to suppress "never mutated" warnings
- Always emit `_ = argc; _ = argv;` to handle edge cases with contaminated blocks
- Fix test262 runner to use relative path for edgeboxc binary

Verified: 9 benchmarks pass (fib, loop, gcd, mandelbrot, tail_recursive,
typed_array, average, fib_small, prime_factors)
